params.cutoff: Sets the Faust Voice low-pass filter cutoff. Higher values make the saw oscillator brighter.
params.resonance: Controls emphasis at the filter cutoff. Higher values create a stronger resonant peak.
params.attack: Sets the envelope rise time after note-on. Low values are plucky; higher values create a slower fade-in.
params.release: Sets the envelope fall time after note-off. Higher values produce longer tails.
params.level: Sets the final output level for the voice.
